message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam packageStyle rectangle

title IPv4 Packet Transmission Sequence Diagram

actor "Upper layer" as upper
database "tuple" as tuple_db
participant "IPv4 layer" as ipv4_layer
database "Routing table" as routing_table
package "IP Layer" {
    ipv4_layer
    routing_table
}

package "IPv4 Ineterface" {
    participant "IPv4 interface" as ipv4_interface
    database "ARP" as arp_db
}
actor "Lower layer" as lower

note left of ipv4_layer: IPv4.dst=192.0.2.1\nIPv4.src=198.51.100.2

upper -> ipv4_layer : IPdata
activate ipv4_layer
note right of ipv4_layer: Allocate\nIPv4\nheader
ipv4_layer -> routing_table : dst=192.0.2.1
activate routing_table
routing_table --> ipv4_layer
deactivate routing_table
ipv4_layer --> upper
deactivate ipv4_layer

note left of upper: IPv4.oif=ifp1\nIPv4.gw=198.51.100.1

ipv4_layer -> ipv4_interface : 
activate ipv4_interface
ipv4_interface -> arp_db : gw=198.51.100.1
note right of arp_db: enqueue\npacket
arp_db --> ipv4_interface : ARP request
ipv4_interface -> lower : 
lower --> ipv4_interface : ARP response
ipv4_interface -> arp_db : 
arp_db --> ipv4_interface : resolved packets
ipv4_interface -> ipv4_interface : send as\nsend thread
ipv4_interface -> lower : 
deactivate ipv4_interface

@enduml
```
